treeliable.config.title: Treeliable Config
treeliable.config.enabled.tooltip: Master switch to enable or disable the entire mod.
treeliable.config.chopping_enabled.toolt: Toggles chopping behavior by default. Can be toggled in-game.
treeliable.config.sneak_behavior.tooltip: Defines what happens to chopping when the player is sneaking.
If enabled, trees can be chopped down while in creative mode.
treeliable.config.hytale_like_felling.to: When enabled, you must break a whole layer of a tree block-by-block before the rest of the tree above it will fall. (Recommended for large 2x2 or modded trees)
treeliable.config.drop_loot_for_chopped_: If enabled, each chopped block in the tree drops its appropriate item.
treeliable.config.must_use_correct_tool_: Must Use Correct Tool for Drops
If true, you must use the correct tool (e.g. an axe) to get drops from the tree.
treeliable.config.must_use_fast_breaking: If true, you must use a fast-breaking tool (like an axe) or the mod will essentially do nothing.
treeliable.config.prevent_chopping_on_ri: Prevents chopping functionality from activating when right-clicking.
treeliable.config.prevent_chop_recursion: Prevents recursive loop crashes if another mod tries to break blocks when chopping.
treeliable.config.trees_must_have_leaves: If true, logs without connected leaves won't be considered a valid tree.
treeliable.config.max_tree_blocks.toolti: Maximum number of logs in a tree before the mod stops counting.
treeliable.config.max_leaves_blocks.tool: Maximum number of leaf blocks to process.
treeliable.config.max_break_leaves_dista: Maximum shortest-path distance from logs to break connected leaves.
treeliable.config.fell_leaves_strategy.t: How to handle leaves when felling a tree (e.g., ignore, break, decay).
treeliable.config.fell_credit_strategy.t: Who gets credit for felling the tree (determines statistics and proper tool usage).
treeliable.config.damage_tool_per_log.to: If enabled, the tool will take 1 durability damage for every log in the tree that is felled. The felling process will stop if the tool breaks.
treeliable.config.exhaustion_per_log.too: If enabled, the player will gain a small amount of hunger exhaustion for every log in the tree that is felled.
treeliable.config.chop_counting_algorith: Algorithm used to calculate how many chops are needed based on tree size.
treeliable.config.chop_count_rounding.to: How to round the calculated chop count to a whole number.
treeliable.config.can_require_more_chops: Can Require More Chops Than Blocks
If true, huge trees can require more individual chops than they have logs.
treeliable.config.logarithmic_a.tooltip: The 'A' factor parameter for the logarithmic algorithm.
treeliable.config.linear_m.tooltip: The multiplier (M) for the linear algorithm.
treeliable.config.linear_b.tooltip: The base additive (B) for the linear algorithm.
treeliable.config.delay_felling_layers.t: When enabled, the tree will break layer-by-layer starting from the bottom with a delay between each vertical level.
treeliable.config.felling_layer_delay_ti: The amount of time (in game ticks) to wait between breaking each horizontal layer of the tree. 20 ticks = 1 second.
treeliable.config.exponential_felling_sp: If true, felling layers start at the initial delay ticks but exponentially speed up as they reach the top of the tree.
treeliable.config.show_feedback_messages: Show chat messages when toggling in-game settings.
treeliable.config.verbose_api.tooltip: Enable detailed API and debugging logging in the console.
treeliable.config.suppress_vanilla_leaf_: If enabled, leaves won't play a sound when a tree is felled.
Enable compatibility logic for Silent Gear.
treeliable.config.silentgear_saw_chops.t: Number of chops provided in a single swing by a Silent Gear saw.
treeliable.config.items_filter_type.tool: Whether the items list functions as a whitelist or blacklist.
treeliable.config.choppable_blocks.toolt: List of block tags or IDs that can be chopped.
treeliable.config.choppable_blocks_excep: List of block tags or IDs to explicitly exclude from chopping.
treeliable.config.leaves_blocks.tooltip: List of block tags or IDs to be considered as leaves.
treeliable.config.leaves_blocks_exceptio: List of block tags or IDs to explicitly exclude from being leaves.
treeliable.config.chopping_items.tooltip: List of specific item IDs affected by the filter type.
